summary: BUG-192-004: Added --color-status-healthy, --color-chart-* CSS variables to globals.css (dark+light). Replaced all hardcoded hex colors (#10b981, #6366f1, #f59e0b, #f87171, #fbbf24, #38bdf8, blue-500/blue-950 Tailwind classes) in ClusterHealthWidget, AnomalyTimeline, StatCardsWidget, ResourceChartsWidget, PodStatusWidget, DashboardEditBar, and page.tsx with proper CSS variable references. BUG-192-005: Fixed addWidget silent failure — applyServerLayout now only overwrites local Zustand state when server returns non-empty widgets array. Previously an empty server response would clobber locally-added widgets. BUG-192-005: Connected all dashboard query refetchIntervals to user-chosen intervalMs so widgets actually live-refresh at the configured rate. FEAT-192-001: Created useRefreshInterval hook (reads/writes localStorage key voyager-refresh-interval, default 5min), RefreshIntervalSelector component (dropdown with 30s/1m/5m/15m/30m/1hr options + animated LIVE pulsing indicator), and DashboardRefreshContext (React context to propagate interval to all widgets). All Recharts/tRPC queries in dashboard widgets now honour the user-selected interval. RefreshIntervalSelector placed in dashboard header. BUG-192-006: Updated AddClusterWizard Step 1 provider cards to 2026 UX standards: selected card has border-2 border-[var(--color-accent)], bg-[var(--color-accent)]/5, scale-[1.02] transform; CheckCircle2 icon appears/disappears with opacity transition; unselected cards have border-border hover effect.
